source: .specs/agent-scenarios.md → Feature: Turn end via terminal text
notes: Spec asserts: ready → working → ready when a turn ends with a terminal assistant text message and no tool call. The canonical end signal is stop_reason: end_turn on the final assistant message; parser.resolveAssistantStreaming's terminal-stop_reason allow-list (end_turn / stop_sequence / refusal / tool_use) routes this to assistant (not assistant_streaming), which makes IsAgentDone()=true and classifier rule 2b fires working→ready. Overlaps intentionally with basic-turn — this cell pins the end-signal mechanism specifically. Final state = ready.

text: stop_reason: end_turn in terminal assistant message drives state to ready (rule 2b via IsAgentDone)
